growth_records.strain: B. breve 46 (LMG P-26117), B. longum 6:18 (LMG P-26115), B. animalis lactis 8:8 (LMG P-26116), L. plantarum F44 (LMG P-26120); experiments 1a-1c

up.method: calculated from sum(lactate+acetate+ethanol)/2 assuming 2 mol acid per mol hexose

growth_records.cite: Adamberg, Signe et al. Survival and synergistic growth of mixed cultures of bifidobacteria and lactobacilli combined with prebiotic oligosaccharides in a gastrointestinal tract simulator. Microbial Ecology in Health and Disease (2014). DOI:10.3402/mehd.v25.23062. [PMC4101457]
growth_records.snippet: B. breve 46 had the highest average specific growth rate on both substrate combinations (mu_ave=0.43+/-0.09 and 0.33+/-0.03 h-1, in GOS-FOS-XOS and GOS-SS media, respectively)
growth_records.notes: Per-strain specific growth rates (calculated as mu=D + dN/(dt*N), Table 4, GOS-FOS-XOS): B. breve 46 = 0.43+/-0.09 h-1 (reported as primary; doubling = ln2/0.43 = 1.61 h); L. plantarum F44 = 0.26+/-0.04 h-1 (doubling 2.67 h); L. paracasei F8 = NA (not in experiment set 1). Consumption and product values (Table 4) are community-level CUMULATIVE amounts per gDW over the dilution phase (NOT per hour): hexose consumed 302.4+/-180.9, acetate 347.8+/-179.4, lactate 138.7+/-115.6, ethanol 91.7+/-51.1 mmol/gDW. Yxs 0.02+/-0.01 gDW/g hexose. Dilution rate ramped 0.4->0.04 h-1 (de-celerostat). Biomass dry mass estimated as cfu/mL * 0.25 pg/cell. Bifidobacteria fraction at 24 h = 52.7%.

growth_records.strain: B. breve 46 (LMG P-26117), B. animalis lactis 8:8 (LMG P-26116), B. pseudocatenulatum 1200T (JCM 1200), L. plantarum F44 (LMG P-26120), L. paracasei F8 (LMG P-26118); experiments 2a-2c
growth_records.medium: GITS dilution medium + GOS & soluble starch
growth_records.cite: Adamberg, Signe et al. Survival and synergistic growth of mixed cultures of bifidobacteria and lactobacilli combined with prebiotic oligosaccharides in a gastrointestinal tract simulator. Microbial Ecology in Health and Disease (2014). DOI:10.3402/mehd.v25.23062. [PMC4101457]
growth_records.snippet: mu_ave=0.43+/-0.09 and 0.33+/-0.03 h-1, in GOS-FOS-XOS and GOS-SS media ... for acetate 225.8+/-100.8 vs. 347.8+/-179.4 mmol/gdw and for lactate 85.4+/-74.4 vs. 138.7+/-115.6 mM gdw
growth_records.notes: Per-strain specific growth rates (Table 4, GOS-SS medium; mu=D+dN/(dt*N)): B. breve 46 = 0.33+/-0.03 h-1 (primary; doubling ln2/0.33=2.10 h); L. plantarum F44 = 0.27+/-0.07 h-1 (doubling 2.57 h); L. paracasei F8 = 0.33+/-0.09 h-1 (doubling 2.10 h). Community CUMULATIVE per-gDW amounts over dilution phase (not per hour): hexose 183.8+/-90.2, acetate 225.8+/-100.8, lactate 85.4+/-74.4, ethanol 41.3+/-13.7 mmol/gDW. Yxs 0.04+/-0.02 gDW/g hexose. De-celerostat D ramp 0.4->0.04 h-1. Bifidobacteria fraction at 24 h = 12.4%. L. paracasei F8 grew well here despite poor GOS/SS fermentation in pure culture (cross-feeding inferred).
